name: Punishing Blow
additional_info: If you M1 your opponent during their M1 animation, they will be dazed for 1 second. Also procs if you land a critical with the M1 tag during their M1 animation.
desc: [Heavy Weapons] Daze opponents for 1s and Stagger PvE enemies for 2s when you interrupt their Basic Attack / actions with your own.
